description:
Debug Network Faster & Smarter with Proxyman

Proxyman is a high-performance Windows app, which enables developers to capture, inspect, and manipulate HTTP/HTTPS requests/responses with ease.
✨ Features
- Introduce Custom Root Certificate
- New UI for URL Editor in Compose and Breakpoint
- Auto clean up Memory if it exceeds 2Gb
- Bump Electron to v28.2.2 and Node.js to v18.20.8 for better performance

🐞 Bugs
- Script can't modify the m3u8 Request/Response
- Fix bunch of issue on Sentry
